prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated 3.0L Austin A90 Atlantic inline-4 (engine code: 26D) bored to 3.2L with a forged crankshaft (Crower 4340 steel crank), forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), and a custom billet aluminum connecting rod set (Manley H-beam rods). Paired with a high-lift camshaft (Schneider Racing Cams 280° duration, 0.480" lift) and dual Weber 45 DCOE carburetors on a custom intake manifold (TWM Performance billet aluminum).

Full drivetrain reinforcement: 4-speed manual transmission (BN1 original) upgraded with a Quaife ATB differential (80% lock), a custom driveshaft (GKN Driveline 4340 chromoly steel), and a Tilton Engineering twin-disc clutch (7.25" organic/ceramic hybrid).

Suspension overhaul with a custom coilover setup (Ohlins Road & Track DFV dampers, 400lb/in front springs, 350lb/in rear springs) paired with polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90A durometer) and a front sway bar (Addco 1.125" hollow). Rear leaf springs replaced with a custom 5-leaf parabolic setup (Eibach Pro-Leaf) and adjustable panhard rod (Whiteline adjustable rose-jointed).
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using hand-formed aluminum panels (replicating the 1954 Le Mans race car's flared fenders) with riveted aluminum side skirts and a rear diffuser (Rocket Bunny-inspired, but custom-fabricated for BN1 dimensions).
Lightweight aluminum bonnet with a functional central scoop (duplicated from the 100S homologation model) and a custom aluminum radiator shroud (fabricated by Rad Rides by Troy).

Retro-modern interior with a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard (Ebony Alcantara with red stitching), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, quick-release hub), and custom bucket seats (Sparco Pro ADV, trimmed in black leather with red diamond-quilted inserts). Roll cage integrated with a custom bolt-in T45 steel cage (Custom Cages UK, powder-coated gloss black) and removable door bars for vintage events.
